Uses of Class
it.tdlight.jni.TdApi.ChatPermissions

  • Uses of TdApi.ChatPermissions in it.tdlight.jni

    Fields in it.tdlight.jni declared as TdApi.ChatPermissions
    Modifier and Type Field Description
    TdApi.ChatPermissions TdApi.ChatEventPermissionsChanged.newPermissions
    New chat permissions.
    TdApi.ChatPermissions TdApi.ChatEventPermissionsChanged.oldPermissions
    Previous chat permissions.
    TdApi.ChatPermissions TdApi.Chat.permissions
    Actions that non-administrator chat members are allowed to take in the chat.
    TdApi.ChatPermissions TdApi.ChatMemberStatusRestricted.permissions
    User permissions in the chat.
    TdApi.ChatPermissions TdApi.SetChatPermissions.permissions
    New non-administrator members permissions in the chat.
    TdApi.ChatPermissions TdApi.UpdateChatPermissions.permissions
    The new chat permissions.
    Constructors in it.tdlight.jni with parameters of type TdApi.ChatPermissions
    Constructor Description
    Chat​(long id, TdApi.ChatType type, String title, TdApi.ChatPhotoInfo photo, TdApi.ChatPermissions permissions, TdApi.Message lastMessage, TdApi.ChatPosition[] positions, boolean isMarkedAsUnread, boolean isBlocked, boolean hasScheduledMessages, boolean canBeDeletedOnlyForSelf, boolean canBeDeletedForAllUsers, boolean canBeReported, boolean defaultDisableNotification, int unreadCount, long lastReadInboxMessageId, long lastReadOutboxMessageId, int unreadMentionCount, TdApi.ChatNotificationSettings notificationSettings, int messageTtlSetting, TdApi.ChatActionBar actionBar, TdApi.VoiceChat voiceChat, long replyMarkupMessageId, TdApi.DraftMessage draftMessage, String clientData)
    A chat.
    ChatEventPermissionsChanged​(TdApi.ChatPermissions oldPermissions, TdApi.ChatPermissions newPermissions)
    The chat permissions was changed.
    ChatMemberStatusRestricted​(boolean isMember, int restrictedUntilDate, TdApi.ChatPermissions permissions)
    The user is under certain restrictions in the chat.
    SetChatPermissions​(long chatId, TdApi.ChatPermissions permissions)
    Changes the chat members permissions.
    UpdateChatPermissions​(long chatId, TdApi.ChatPermissions permissions)
    Chat permissions was changed.
